## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Forge Tools improvements

- 🌙 Quenched the eternal flame — DropShadowEffect pulses now finite
- 🌙 Woke the dead code — elixirs now actually work in dungeon runs
- Contextual idle tips — tool-aware suggestion engine (#1244)
- XcelForge interactive guide overlay — 4-step onboarding walkthrough (#1242)
- Added smart suggestion chips to SortForge's no-results state
- Added Batch Tag Window behavior
- 🌙 Merged — CheckMilestoneConfetti: SortForge now celebrates your sorts (#1235)
- 🌙 Merged — ReduceMotion guard + stored delegate for mania timer (#1240)
- 🌙 Merged — EnableEasterEggs guards + stored delegate for PacketSniffer (#1241)
- 🌙 Merged — Eliminated LINQ allocations in BarForge emote generators (#1236)
- 🌙 Merged — FontAwesomeSolid pin glyph with proper fallback (#1238)
- 🌙 Merged — file_path filter for query_memory tool (#1247)

_(+ 5 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
